kits.title: Brainrot Appliance Mascots – 5 Chunky Character
kits.description: 5 separate, named, grid-snappable MeshParts, organized under one Model: fridgemund, toastyboi, microwarrior, blendrick, kettleking. Drop the Model into Studio and snap the pieces together to build your own layout.

kits.title: Dark Sovereign's Throne Room
kits.description: 10 separate, named, grid-snappable MeshParts, organized under one Model: grand dark throne, octagonal boss platform with stairs, floor tile variant set, gothic arch wall segment, angled corner wall piece, fluted pillar column, hanging iron brazier, twisted iron floor candelabra, eight arm black iron chandelier, spiked double boss gate. Drop the Model into Studio and snap the pieces together to build your own layout.

kits.title: 5 Modular Horror NPC Characters
kits.description: 5 separate, named, character MeshParts, organized under one Model: hollownurse, rustwarden, paleusher, crawlermother, ashchild. Drop the Model into Studio and place each character as an NPC, mascot or set piece — every figure is its own MeshPart, so you can use them together or on their own.

kits.title: Spooky Hollow — Whimsical Horror Toon Survival
kits.description: 10 separate, named, grid-snappable MeshParts, organized under one Model: rainbarrel, patchedbedroll, clawedsupplycrate, gnarleddeadtree, bubblingcauldron, glowcapmushrooms, butcherstump, crookedgravemarker, grinninglantern, crookedcampfire. Drop the Model into Studio and snap the pieces together to build your own layout. Includes AI-assisted 3D generation.

kits.title: Squeaky Clean — Satisfying Cleaning Sim Kit
kits.description: 10 separate, named, grid-snappable MeshParts, organized under one Model: trashbin wheeled, broom and dustpan, feather duster, wet floor sign, vacuum upright, spray bottle, mopbucket wringer, cleaning cart, scrub brush, mop standard. Drop the Model into Studio and snap the pieces together to build your own layout. Includes AI-assisted 3D generation.

kits.title: Tidy Library Interior Kit
kits.description: 10 separate, named, grid-snappable MeshParts, organized under one Model. Drop the Model into Studio and snap the pieces together to build your own layout. Includes AI-assisted 3D generation.
